content_body: We had a group of 10 ladies. On Friday, we arrived at the cabin; it was amazing. We all entered the cabin and began exploring each room. For some of the women on our trip, it was their first time experiencing the cabin life. All I can say is that they are hooked. I would highly recommend this property to all my family and friends. The pictures did not do the cabin any justice. It was more amazing. Thanks for the experience.
title: Amazing
